case_title: STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-21-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-02-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
